description_long: This is a compact arcade game kiosk with a retro-inspired design, featuring a pastel peach color scheme accented by blue palm trees and white trim. The front panel displays a large screen area, a joystick, and several buttons, suggesting interactive gameplay. The lower front section includes a coin slot and access panel, typical of arcade machines. Both side panels are decorated with the game's title, 'Flip Flop COP,' and stylized palm tree graphics, enhancing its playful, summery aesthetic. The back panel is solid black with ventilation slots and access points for maintenance. The overall structure is made of sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a glossy laminate finish, and is designed to be approachable and visually engaging in public urban spaces.
description: A pastel peach arcade game kiosk with palm tree graphics, a screen, joystick, and coin slot, designed for interactive public use. Its retro style and bold signage make it visually striking and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the screen, joystick, buttons, coin slot, and the 'Flip Flop COP' logo above and below the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sloped profile, large palm tree graphic, and prominent 'Flip Flop COP' signage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a solid black panel with ventilation slots and no interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the same palm tree graphic and signage, showing the angled top and side profile.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, integrated into the structure on the front and both side panels, displaying 'Flip Flop COP' with palm tree graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped roof with a flat top, constructed from the same material as the body, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro arcade with playful, modern graphic influences.
